fields.description:
## Why
Two zero-to-low-code investments that protect the design and cut review cost at source. NOTE: R-3 (maintainer-facing invariant doc) and R-5 (author-facing guide + tooling) are DISTINCT deliverables with different actors and independent value -- may be split into two child tasks; kept together here for context.

## What
- R-3: document the stage-by-stage asymmetric-error invariant in docs/plan-review-gate.md (finder errs-toward-surface; verifier errs-toward-author; DET floor fails-open; claim gate fails-closed; novelty/completion floors fail-toward-KEEP). Add a floor-tuning/criteria-authoring checklist note.
- R-5 (SEQUENCE AFTER WS1-8): a longer-form Markdown authoring guide DERIVED from the registry, section-keyed by criterion id. CORRECTION: the existing parity gate (validate_packaged_routing in registry.py) only checks routing JSON vs CANONICAL_LLM vocab -- it does NOT cover a guide, so R-5 must EXTEND the gate (or add a new parity check) to keep the guide in sync; do not assume existing coverage.
- rebar explain <criterion-id>: net-new across CLI (src/rebar/_cli/_llm_commands.py), MCP tool, and library export. Define ONE shared library lookup the CLI/MCP wrap. Specify error states: unknown id, malformed registry, missing backing file.
- Coach anchored deep-links: Pass-4 renderer (passes.py) + CLI text renderer emit a URL#anchor into the guide; specify anchor-stability (explicit heading anchor keyed by criterion id) and note downstream consumers of coach output format.

## Provenance
Labels like G-8 / FP-3a / R-6 / WS-N are provenance tags from the DSO gap-report evaluation (~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md) + session log brief-bride-rash (95f1-1b3b-a867-4020) -- they are NOT codebase symbols and cannot be grepped. Concrete code targets are named inline and in this ticket's file_impact.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] R-3 invariant + tuning checklist documented in docs/plan-review-gate.md.
- [ ] Registry-derived authoring guide, section-keyed by criterion id. Proof: a generator/parity check fails when a criterion lacks a guide section; run it in CI.
- [ ] Parity gate EXTENDED to cover the guide. Proof: `python -m rebar.llm.plan_review.registry validate-routing` (or the new check) fails on a missing/renamed section.
- [ ] rebar explain <criterion-id> works in CLI + MCP + library off one shared lookup, with defined errors for unknown-id/malformed-registry/missing-file. Proof: `rebar explain F1` prints the section; `rebar explain BOGUS` exits non-zero with a clear message; unit tests for all three surfaces.
- [ ] --help epilog URL added to review-plan; coach output emits stable anchored deep-links.
- [ ] Sequenced after WS1-8 (dependency, not an AC to self-verify).
